prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该科类最低位次分别为约12178名→10708名→9944名→10129名→14691名。2021至2023年呈逐年前移趋势（竞争加剧），2024年略有后移，2025年出现明 显后移，较2024年后移约4562名，基准位次约14691名；该校在贵州省2021–2025年招生计划分别为31人、31人、30人、30人、31人，整体保持稳定。2026年计划招生37人，较2025年增加6人，扩招约19.4%，扩招幅度较大，对竞争格局产生明显影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉:
211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第62 名（2025年第48名），近年排名在48–62名区间波动，整体处于全国中上游水平；该校在声誉评价文件中未被收录，说明近年无明显重大负面舆情事件；抖音学 校热度排名中未进入前106名，短视频平台关注度一般，报考热度无明显异常信号；投档异常文件中亦无该校记录，历史录取走势平稳；石油与天然气工程为A+ 学科（全国顶尖），化学工程与技术为A-学科，安全科学与工程为B+学科；与该校石油工程、化工与制药类、安全工程等招生专业高度关联，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
6. 【专业热度与环境】计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度高热推荐；能源动力类专业（含石油工程、新能源科学与工程）评估为推荐偏热，行业前景 良好。贵州省2026年高考总考生约299000人，较2025年总考生297258人略有增加；物理类考生估算约208400人，较2025年物理类207171人小幅增长，竞争略有加剧。2026年。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 学校位于北京市，对贵州考生有一定地域吸引力；该校在贵州招生计划占比较小（约31–37人），属跨省招生中的中等规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次2025年大幅后移的走势、2026年招生计划显著扩招（+19.4%）带来的竞争加剧效应、以及本省考生总数小幅增长等因素，预计2026年最低位次在2025年基准 14691名基础上继续后移。扩招使位次数字增大，考生增加和能源专业热度亦对位次有上移作用。预测最低位次约16448名，区间15948–16948名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约16448名，区间15948–16948名。建议位次在预测区间内的考生以二档专业为主力填报方向，一档专业作为冲刺选择，三档专业作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<15 948名）可重点冲刺一档的计算机科学与技术、自动化等热门专业；位次接近区间上限（>16948名）建议以三档专业为主，兼顾二档中位次相对靠后的专业。石油工程（A+学科） 虽属二档但学科实力突出，值得重点关注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for this subject category were approximately 12178 → 10708 → 9944 → 10129 → 14691. From 2021 to 2023, there was a year-on-year upward trend (increased competition), with a slight decline in 2024, and a significant decline in 2025, moving back about 4562 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of approximately 14691. The university's enrollment plan in Guizhou Province from 2021 to 2025 was 31, 31, 30, 30, and 31 students respectively, remaining generally stable. In 2026, the planned enrollment is 37 students, an increase of 6 students compared to 2025, an expansion of about 19.4%, which is a relatively large expansion and will significantly impact the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 62nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (48th in 2025), with recent rankings fluctuating between 48th and 62nd, overall at the mid-to-upper level nationally. The university is not included in the reputation evaluation file, indicating no significant negative public opinion incidents in recent years. It is not among the top 106 in Douyin university popularity rankings, indicating average attention on short video platforms and no abnormal signals in application popularity. There are no records of the university in the abnormal filing file, indicating a stable historical admission trend. Petroleum and Natural Gas Engineering is an A+ discipline (top in the country), Chemical Engineering and Technology is an A- discipline, and Safety Science and Engineering is a B+ discipline. These are highly related to the university's enrollment majors such as Petroleum Engineering, Chemical and Pharmaceutical Engineering, and Safety Engineering, providing some attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: The university is located in Beijing, which has a certain geographical attraction for Guizhou candidates. Its enrollment plan in Guizhou accounts for a relatively small proportion (about 31–37 students), which is a medium scale among cross-provincial enrollments.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant decline in historical rankings in 2025, the intensified competition effect from the notable enrollment expansion in 2026 (+19.4%), and the slight increase in the total number of candidates in the province, the minimum ranking in 2026 is expected to continue to decline from the 2025 baseline of 14691. The expansion will increase the ranking number, while the increase in candidates and the popularity of energy majors will also have an upward effect on the ranking. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 16448, with a range of 15948–16948.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 16448, range 15948–16948. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, with Tier 1 majors as a sprint choice and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<15948) can focus on sprinting for popular Tier 1 majors such as Computer Science and Technology and Automation; candidates with rankings near the upper limit (>16948) are advised to mainly choose Tier 3 majors, while also considering Tier 2 majors with relatively lower rankings. Petroleum Engineering (A+ discipline), although in Tier 2, has outstanding academic strength and is worth special attention.
